vulnerability.reference: Workers cannot anticipate robot paths because simulation fails to capture real-world contact dynamics.
vulnerability.generated: Shared workspace lacking real-time safety monitoring for out-of-distribution robot dynamics

impact.reference: Physical injury and psychological stress from unexpected collisions, deteriorating human-robot trust.
impact.generated: Assembly line workers sustain traumatic injuries from robot arm collisions

dose_response.reference: Data scaling entrenches simulation biases causing out-of-distribution failures, which in assembly leads to unpredictable robot arm collisions that physically injure workers and erode trust.
dose_response.generated: Data scaling for sim-to-real transfer entrenches simulation biases causing unanticipated robot failures, which, through assembly line workers' close interaction, triggers the absence of real-time safety monitoring, leading to traumatic injuries from robot arm collisions.
